zh.lifeSummary: 當Margery Poynings於1298年出生在英國素可波尼斯時，她的父親Thomas de Poynings5歲，母親Agnes Rokesley-1歲。她於大約1323年與Edmund Bacon在英國諾福爾可巴根斯索普結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。她去世於1349年3月20日在法國諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯帕-德-卡拉斯卡拉斯享年51歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margery Poynings于1298年出生在英国素可波尼斯时，她的父亲Thomas de Poynings5岁，母亲Agnes Rokesley-1岁。她于大约1323年与Edmund Bacon在英国諾福爾可巴根斯索普结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。她去世于1349年3月20日在法国諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯帕-德-卡拉斯卡拉斯享年51岁。

nameMeanings.name: Margery
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual medieval vernacular form of   Margaret   (now also commonly spelled   Marjorie  ). This form of the name is preserved in the nursery rhyme ‘See-saw, Margery Daw’.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Margery Poynings was born in 1298, in Poynings, Sussex, England, her father, Thomas de Poynings, was 5 and her mother, Agnes Rokesley, was -1. She married Edmund Bacon about 1323, in Baconsthorpe, Norfolk, England. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. She died on 20 March 1349, in Calais, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France, at the age of 51.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margery Poynings est née en 1298, à Poynings, Sussex, Angleterre, son père, Thomas de Poynings, avait 5 ans et sa mère, Agnes Rokesley, avait -1 ans. Elle a épousé Edmund Bacon environ 1323, à Baconsthorpe, Norfolk, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 20 mars 1349, à Calais, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France, à l’âge de 51 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margery Poynings 1298 in Poynings, Sussex, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Thomas de Poynings 5 und ihre Mutter Agnes Rokesley -1. Sie hat um 1323 in Baconsthorpe, Norfolk, England Edmund Bacon geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 20. März 1349 im Alter von 51 Jahren in Calais, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margery Poynings è nata il nel 1298 nel Poynings, Sussex, England, sua padre, Thomas de Poynings, aveva 5 anni e sua madre, Agnes Rokesley, aveva -1 anni. Lei sposato Edmund Bacon circa 1323, nel Baconsthorpe, Norfolk, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Morì il 20 marzo 1349, nel Calais, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia, all'età di 51 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Margery Poyningsが1298年にイギリススセックスポイニングズで生まれた時，父Thomas de Poyningsは5歳，母Agnes Rokesleyは-1歳であった。約1323年にイギリスノーフォルクバコンスソルペでEdmund Baconと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1349年3月20日にフランスノード-プアス-デ-カレイスプアス-デ-カレイスカレイスで51歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Margery Poynings(이)가 1298년 영국 수세스 포이닝스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Thomas de Poynings(은)는 5세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Agnes Rokesley(은)는 -1세였다. 그녀는 대략 1323년 영국 노르폴크 바콘스소에서 Edmund Bacon(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1349년 3월 20일 프랑스 노르드-파스-데-캘레이 파스-데-캘레이 캘레이에서 51세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.Wallingford, Oxfordshire, England: Wallingford, Oxenaford, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margery Poynings nasceu em 1298, em Poynings, Sussex, Inglaterra, seu pai, Thomas de Poynings, tinha 5 anos e sua mãe, Agnes Rokesley, tinha -1 anos. Ela casou-se com Edmund Bacon aproximadamente 1323, em Baconsthorpe, Norfolk, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 20 de março de 1349, em Calais, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, França, com 51 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margery Poynings родилась в 1298 г. в местности поинингс, суссекс, Англия, её отцу по имени Thomas de Poynings было 5 лет, а матери, которую звали Agnes Rokesley, -1. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Edmund Bacon около 1323 г. в местности бакунстаурп, норфолк, Англия. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Она умерла 20 марта 1349 г. в местности калеи, пас-де-калеи, норд-пас-де-калеи, Франция в возрасте 51 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Margery Poynings nació en 1298, en Poynings, Sussex, Inglaterra, su papá, Thomas de Poynings, tenía 5 años y su mamá, Agnes Rokesley, tenía -1 años. Se casó con Edmund Bacon aproximadamente 1323, en Baconsthorpe, Norfolk, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija. Murió el 20 de marzo de 1349, en Calais, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia, a la edad de 51 años.
